name: The Genome Project
gamePlan: Kuja builds an army of 0/1 Wizard tokens that ping each opponent for 1 whenever you cast a noncreature spell. The commander produces one token per end step automatically. Once you control four Wizards (including Kuja), he transforms into Trance Kuja, doubling all Wizard damage. The deck then chains cheap noncreature spells — draw, rituals, cantrips — to deal escalating burn damage to the entire table simultaneously.
winLine: Trance Kuja + City on Fire (x3 dmg) — 1-2 casts kill the table

finishers.name: Wizard Ping Storm
finishers.note: Trance Kuja + 4 Wizard tokens = 8 damage per opponent per noncreature spell.

finishers.name: Multiplier Stack
finishers.note: Trance Kuja + Harmonic Prodigy (or Roaming Throne) + 3–4 Wizard tokens = 12–16 damage per spell per opponent.

finishers.name: Bonus Round / Mizzix's Mastery / Underworld Breach Graveyard Storm
finishers.note: Bonus Round doubles every instant and sorcery for the rest of the turn — **but its copies are NOT cast** (oracle ruling: the copy "is created on the stack, so it's not 'cast'"), so **copies do not trigger Wizard pings**.

finishers.name: Aetherflux Reservoir
finishers.note: Chain spells to gain escalating life (1st spell = 1 life, 2nd = 2, etc.).

finishers.name: Exsanguinate
finishers.note: After generating large mana via Mana Geyser (multiplayer = massive output), Neheb (post-combat mana from ping damage), or Jeska's Will, fire a lethal Exsanguinate at the table.
